nasb.text: Fools, because of their rebellious way, And because of their iniquities, were afflicted.

esv.text: Some were fools through their sinful ways, and because of their iniquities suffered affliction;

cnv.text: 他們有些人因自己的過犯成了愚妄人， 有人受苦是因為自己的罪孽。

ccb.text: 有些人愚顽， 因自己的悖逆和罪恶而受苦，

csbs.text: 另一些是愚妄人， 因自己的叛逆行径和罪孽受苦。
